expectations.text: Does not immediately output a final downstream prompt in the first response
expectations.evidence: The response asks for clarification and does not generate the final downstream prompt.

expectations.text: Asks one focused clarification question about the highest-value missing product detail
expectations.evidence: It stays centered on the core product positioning: what business this membership supports and what rights paid members get.

expectations.text: Keeps the first response to one primary clarification theme rather than a multi-part intake form
expectations.evidence: The reply format is short and stays within one theme instead of broadening into a large intake questionnaire.

suggestions.reason: This eval is no longer very discriminating in iteration-4 because the baseline also stays concise and focused.

eval_feedback.overall: Good sanity check for first-turn restraint, but it now separates versions less clearly than before.
